_comment: Tier-1 mcp_tool source preset(s) for repository-manager (AU-KG.ingest.mcp-tool-connector). Mirrors the workspace's linked git worktrees into the KG as repository documents via the repository-manager MCP server. Native typed-node ingestion (repository_ingest_repositories / kg_ingest.py) is the primary path; this preset covers the generic mcp_tool connector. Contributed presets win over the central MCP_TOOL_PRESETS.
